productName: Honey Stixx - 2pk - Solventless Infused Preroll - Hash - Dark Rainbows X Blackberry
description: This hybrid cartridge loads Dark Rainbow into a sleek 510-thread pen for clean, convenient draws — premium oil, precise hits, zero hassle. Convenient and clean, with notes of pepper, grapefruit, and butter, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
